checklist.description: The script runs `pnpm run generate:openapi` (or equivalent) as part of the chain
checklist.name: generate:openapi step

checklist.description: The script runs `pnpm run generate:ts-client` (or equivalent TypeScript client generation) as part of the chain
checklist.name: generate:ts-client step

checklist.description: The script runs `pnpm run go:generate` (or equivalent Go client generation) as part of the chain
checklist.name: go:generate step

checklist.description: The script runs `pnpm run typecheck` as the final verification step
checklist.name: typecheck step

checklist.description: The steps appear in the correct order: OpenAPI generation → TS client → Go client → typecheck
checklist.name: Correct order

checklist.description: The script uses `set -e` or equivalent error-on-failure mechanism so that if any step fails, subsequent steps are not run
checklist.name: Stops on failure

checklist.description: `REGENERATION.md` explains that skipping the Go generation step causes the CLI to break with a decode error (not a compile-time error)
checklist.name: Docs explain Go breakage

checklist.description: `REGENERATION.md` mentions all three generated artifacts: OpenAPI spec, TypeScript client, and Go client
checklist.name: Docs mention all three outputs

checklist.description: `REGENERATION.md` explains that typecheck is needed to catch downstream TypeScript consumers that were broken by the schema change
checklist.name: Typecheck purpose explained

context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the full API schema regeneration chain: OpenAPI generation → TypeScript client → Go client → typecheck, in the right order and with failure handling.
